seoTitle: Lynton vs Maaoupe — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lynton and Maaoupe. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lynton and Maaoupe.
heading: Lynton vs Maaoupe — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lynton, South Australia and Maaoupe, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lynton has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Maaoupe (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lynton or Maaoupe safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lynton has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Maaoupe scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lynton scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Maaoupe scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lynton or Maaoupe?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lynton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
